title: DRUG AND ALCOHOL TREATMENT - 211info
text: HEPPNER BEHAVIORAL HEALTH DRUG AND ALCOHOL TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Works with individuals to overcome their addictions to alcohol and/or other drugs. Program involves complete alcohol and drug assessment, individual counseling, and classes for substance education and relapse prevention. 550 West Sperry Street Heppner, OR 97836 Eligibility: Unrestricted. Accepts patients for court-ordered treatment following a DUI or other substance-related offense. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-3pm Email (541) 676-9161 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 676-9161 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: Accepts OHP and private insurance. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. No one will be denied care due to inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Morrow County Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Education/Prevention Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Drug Use Disorder Education/Prevention DUI Offender Programs Relapse Prevention Programs Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES COUNSELING SETTINGS - OREGON WARMLINE / LINEA DE ESPERANZA MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COUNTY CRISIS LINE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HEPPNER BEHAVIORAL HEALTH
